/usr/bin/ar qc libmt2core.a CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_usb_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_bt_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt1_encode.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_pipeline.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_lifecycle.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_session.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_geometry.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_usb_reframe.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_connect_sm.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_pane_sm.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/conn_trace.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/genuine_host.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_coordinator.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/vhid_mt1.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_battery.c.o CMakeFiles/mt2core.dir/mt2_single_load.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmt2core.a
